Localization.Description: The multi-factor authentication system received a response from the API

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The multi-factor authentication system received a response from the API that user {object.account.name} was denied access
The multi-factor authentication system received a response from the API that user {object.account.name} was granted access
The multi-factor authentication system received a response from the API that user {object.account.name} is expected to perform an action
